title: Compact quantum group structures on type-I $\mathrm{C}^*$-algebras
author_string: Alexandru Chirvasitu, Jacek Krajczok, Piotr M. Sołtan
abstract: We prove a number of results having to do with equipping type-I $\mathrm{C}^*$-algebras with compact quantum group structures, the two main ones being that such a compact quantum group is necessarily co-amenable, and that if the $\mathrm{C}^*$-algebra in question is an extension of a non-zero finite direct sum of elementary $\mathrm{C}^*$-algebras by a commutative unital $\mathrm{C}^*$-algebra then it must be finite-dimensional.
